title: mirandea nutans
intro: Mirandea nutans, a flowering plant species belonging to the family Lamiaceae, is native to Central America. The medicinal properties of Mirandea nutans include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and act as a natural remedy for digestive issues. Mirandea nutans is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and extracts, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
